tables.sql: CREATE TABLE scheduler_jobs ( job_id TEXT PRIMARY KEY, mission_id TEXT, workflow_id TEXT, step_id TEXT, employee_id TEXT, capability_id TEXT, job_type TEXT NOT NULL, priority INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 50, state TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'queued', cpu_required REAL NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, ram_mb_required INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, gpu_required INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, vram_mb_required INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, required_labels_json TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}', payload_json TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}', max_attempts INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 3, attempt_count INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, not_before TEXT, assigned_worker_id TEXT, lease_id TEXT, lease_expires_at TEXT, result_json TEXT, error TEXT, created_at TEXT NOT NULL, queued_at TEXT NOT NULL, started_at TEXT, completed_at TEXT, updated_at TEXT NOT NULL )
